events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need determine decision: scenario ladder reinforcement spacing exceeded in block/brick laying rough-complete. Ladder reinforcement (joint reinforcement) spacing must comply with TMS 402/602. Exceeded spacing means non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk: medium or high? Ladder reinforcement spacing affects crack control and structural performance in masonry. Could be medium. We'll say medium. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80? Value null 0. Confidence high 0.9. Findings: ladder reinforcement spacing exceeds allowable spacing per TMS 402/602, joint reinforcing not placed at specified intervals. Actions: verify spacing per approved shop drawings/specifications, remove/replace or add supplementary reinforcement as required, obtain inspection. Rationale: TMS 402/602 specifies maximum spacing for joint reinforcement; observed spacing exceeded, work is non-compliant and must be corrected. References: TMS 402/602. Need exact raw JSON.
